name: Lead Nurture Sequence
description: Read new CRM leads, generate personalised nurture emails per lead, queue outreach, update lead status to nurturing, track.

steps.name: crm_reader
steps.label: Read new qualified leads from CRM

then.prompt: You are a nurture copywriter for Bridge AI. For each lead in this list, write a personalised nurture email subject and 3-sentence body. The email should reference their company and intent. Return a JSON array: [{name, email, company, score, hook, subject, body}]. Leads: {{records}}
then.system: Return ONLY a valid JSON array. No markdown. Just the array.
then.label: Generate personalised nurture emails

input.subject: Nurture batch ready
input.body: Personalised nurture emails generated and ready to dispatch.

then.message: Nurture sequence triggered for new leads batch. Emails queued.
then.label: Slack: nurture started

else.message: Nurture workflow ran — no new qualified leads found. Nothing to process.
else.label: Slack: no leads
